seoTitle: Gwambegwine vs Habana — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gwambegwine and Habana. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gwambegwine and Habana.
heading: Gwambegwine vs Habana — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gwambegwine, Queensland and Habana, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Habana has a lower overall climate risk score (23/100) compared to Gwambegwine (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gwambegwine or Habana safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gwambegwine has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Habana scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gwambegwine scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Habana scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gwambegwine or Habana?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Habana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
